auth.label: Personal API Token
auth.description: Monday personal V2 API token sent in the Authorization header with an explicit API-Version header. Find it in the monday Developer Center API token tab: https://developer.monday.com/api-reference/docs/authentication.

actions.name: activate_form
actions.description: Activate a Monday Workform so it starts accepting submissions.
